name: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (Pakistan)

colors.symbolism: the rivers and skies of the region

description: A blue field charged centrally with the coat of arms of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.
history: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa is one of the four provinces of Pakistan, in the country's northwest. The province was renamed from "North-West Frontier Province" in 2010. The provincial flag bears the provincial emblem.

features.role: Coat of arms of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa
